---
title: "Software"
output:
  html_document:
    fig_width: 1
    toc_float: false    
---

### **R packages**


<i class="fa fa-code" aria-hidden="true"></i>  [`Robpvc`:](https://github.com/ctruciosm/Robpvc) Robust Principal Volatility Components  \medskip </li>
</br>
<i class="fa fa-code" aria-hidden="true"></i>  [`RobGARCHBoot`:](https://cran.r-project.org/web/packages/RobGARCHBoot/index.html) Robust Bootstrap Forecast Densities for GARCH Models  \medskip </li>
</br>
<i class="fa fa-code" aria-hidden="true"></i>  [`RM2006`:](https://cran.r-project.org/web/packages/RM2006/index.html)  RiskMetrics 2006 Methodology. \medskip </li>
</br>
<i class="fa fa-code" aria-hidden="true"></i>  [`StatPermeco`:](https://cran.r-project.org/web/packages/StatPerMeCo/index.html) Performance Measures to Evaluate Covariance Matrix.  \medskip </li>

</br>

</ol>
----
